seoTitle: Polk County School Calendar 2026-2027 (PCPS): Holidays, Breaks, PDF & Important Dates
seoDescription: View the Polk County Public Schools 2026-2027 calendar for parents and students. Find first day of school, holidays, breaks, early dismissal dates, PDF download, and printable calendar.
calendarNotes: Polk County Public Schools starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 11, 2026 and lists May 27, 2027 as the last day for students with a 150-minute early dismissal. Fall Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 5, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. The official calendar lists storm make-up days on November 23, November 24, January 5, and May 27, so families should verify those dates before booking non-refundable travel. This page is designed for PCPS parents and students who need printable calendar dates, PDF access, and a Google Calendar import option.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Polk County start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Polk County Public Schools starts school on Tuesday, August 11, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Polk County Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Polk County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day for students is Thursday, May 27, 2027, with a 150-minute early dismissal.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Polk 2026-2027 dates are storm make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar lists November 23, November 24, January 5, and May 27 as storm make-up days.

calendarFaqs.q: How many days are in the Polk County 2026-2027 school year?
calendarFaqs.a: Polk County Public Schools lists 180 instructional days for the 2026-2027 school year.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Polk County have school on Veterans Day 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: No. Veterans Day is listed on Wednesday, November 11, 2026, and students do not attend school on that district holiday.

calendarFaqs.q: When does winter break end in Polk County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break ends before students return on Wednesday, January 6, 2027. January 5 is listed as a staff development day and storm make-up day if needed.

calendarFaqs.q: Is the Polk County school calendar available as a PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. This page links to the official Polk County Public Schools 2026-2027 English School Calendar PDF and also summarizes the major dates in a mobile-friendly format.

calendarFaqs.q: How do I add the Polk County school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the Google Calendar import button on this page to download the .ics calendar file, then import it into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook. The file is a one-time import generated from the reviewed PCPS dates.

yearNumbers.label: Early Dismissals
yearNumbers.detail: Students are dismissed 150 minutes early on ten listed dates.

yearNumbers.label: Storm Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: Listed make-up dates are November 23, November 24, January 5, and May 27.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Friday in mid-March.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first student day remains August 11.
Spring Break moves from March 16-20 in 2026 to March 15-19 in 2027.
The last student day moves from May 28 in 2026 to May 27 in 2027.
